segments.text: He's taking center too! Not stopping! Fair on the way down!
segments.original_text: 中央も陣取ってるぞ まだ止まらないさあ降りに空中前

segments.text: That recovery is insane! Way too good! How are you supposed to edgeguard that? 196.3—you seriously can't stop that!
segments.original_text: 復帰がやはりうますぎるうますぎないけどどうやったら狩れるんだ 196.3これはさすがにかさすがに止めきる

full_text: He's taking center too! Not stopping! Fair on the way down! That recovery is insane! Way too good! How are you supposed to edgeguard that? 196.3—you seriously can't stop that!

corrections.rule: Smash term: 降り空前 (descending forward air)
